section_miscategorizations.text: no palpable pulses or sensory deficits.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This appears to be a documentation error rather than a sectioning error: absence of palpable pulses is a critical abnormal vascular finding, yet it is described as if it were a normal exam element alongside otherwise mild sprain findings. Within the constraints of this task, however, it is still formally an exam finding and belongs in Findings, so there is no true section miscategorization.
